approach_summary: Implement the conductor as a deterministic state machine, with a shared tool bus for tests/lint/screenshot and strict circuit breakers.

must: All model outputs validate against JSON schemas
Builder changes are isolated in git branches/worktrees
should: Tournament mode available when stuck or ambiguous
Artifacts saved with redaction before model prompts

plan.title: Run state + directories
plan.description: Create run_id, state.json, artifact directories, and git branches/worktrees.

plan.title: Proposal fan-out
plan.description: Call 3 models in parallel and validate proposal JSON.

plan.title: Master plan
plan.description: Arbiter merges proposals into master_plan.json with MUST/SHOULD/COULD criteria.

tests.notes: Use smoke vs full test sets from master_plan.test_matrix.

risks.title: Scope creep
risks.detail: Unioning criteria can accidentally expand requirements.
risks.mitigation: Use MUST/SHOULD/COULD and only gate on MUST.

unknowns: Exact repo structure may require a repo_summary step.
rollback: Keep all work on run/<run_id> branches; base branch untouched.
